article.title: Uber System Design Round
article.content:
Design a chat application like Facebook Messenger. Describe the system architecture, server side storage, the API, components, data models. Explain how they would work together. Core features to focus on
1:1 conversation (P0)
Group conversation (P0)
Offline users
Delivery/Read / Delivery Receipt
Message history
Group management (add/remove user)

post.content:
Thanks for sharing the question. I'm also prepping to get into big tech and system design prep has been a pain :'''')
Can you tell me what resources you used for your prep ? 
I've seen this exact question on [mockingly](https://mockingly.ai), I got the pro version and it's worked for me. But what else ? Did you read up any good blogs ? Or any videos ?

Anyways, congrats on the opportunity, hope it works out for you :D
Pretty generic system design, thanks for sharing
